data.body:
["Mint Choco Days" Digital Single Release]

Sensei, the digital single for Airi's "Mint Choco Days" is out now! Listen on various platforms for an energetic start to your Monday! 💚

🎵Streaming Platform Link: https://lnk.to/QM0647
